form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 12 at Happy Valley on March 11 over 1800m, 4 len behind Fallon with 59.5kg at $12. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a nose at Happy Valley February 11 over 1650m defeating Max Que with 58.5kg at $15. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 14 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, nose behind The Golden Knight with 58.5kg at $3.10. Before that favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a head at this track March 8 over 1600m defeating Smart Avenue carrying 55.5kg at $12. Went close last time. Shapes as a key runner.
